ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = died, 1 = survived) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the passenger */,
  "seat" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarkation port */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "survival_status" TEXT /* More descriptive survival status */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category (e.g., Adult, Middle_Aged, Child) */,
  "estimated_age" REAL /* Estimated age if the actual age is missing */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name */,
  "family_members" TEXT /* List of family members */,
  "family_status" TEXT /* Family status (e.g., Single, Married, Family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_families_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "fare_outlier" INTEGER /* Fare outlier status (0 = not an outlier, 1 = outlier) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., Regular, Promotional) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the passenger */,
  "mv_deck" INTEGER /* Merged deck status (0 = not merged, 1 = merged) */,
  "deck_type" TEXT /* Type of deck (e.g., Upper, Lower) */,
  "deck_location" TEXT /* Location of the deck (e.g., Port, Starboard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decks_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "_deck_sunderland" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck Sunderland entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the passenger */,
  "deck_type" TEXT /* Type of deck (e.g., Upper, Lower) */,
  "deck_location" TEXT /* Location of the deck (e.g., Port, Starboard) */,
  "lifeboat_proximity" TEXT /* Proximity to lifeboats (e.g., Close, Far) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk__deck_sunderland_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Analyst, Researcher, Administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
